inputs.label: Discharge Coefficient (C)
inputs.businessContext: Discharge coefficient accounting for flow contraction and friction losses, typically 0.6-0.7 for orifice plates.

businessContext_i18n.en: Discharge coefficient accounting for flow contraction and friction losses, typically 0.6-0.7 for orifice plates.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Akış daralması ve sürtünme kayıplarını hesaba katan deşarj katsayısı, orifis plakaları için tipik olarak 0.6-0.7.
businessContext_i18n.de: Ausflussbeiwert zur Berücksichtigung von Strahlkontraktion und Reibungsverlusten, typischerweise 0,6-0,7 für Blenden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient de décharge tenant compte de la contraction de l'écoulement et des pertes par frottement, généralement 0,6-0,7 pour les plaques à orifice.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coeficiente de descarga que considera la contracción del flujo y pérdidas por fricción, típicamente 0.6-0.7 para placas de orificio.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معامل التصريف الذي يأخذ في الاعتبار انقباض التدفق وفقدان الاحتكاك، عادةً 0.6-0.7 للوحات الفتحات.

inputs.label: Orifice Area (A)
inputs.businessContext: Cross-sectional area of the orifice or restriction.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cross-sectional area of the orifice or restriction.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Section transversale de l'orifice ou de la restriction.
businessContext_i18n.es: Área transversal del orificio o restricción.
businessContext_i18n.ar: مساحة المقطع العرضي للفتحة أو التضييق.

inputs.label: Fluid Density (ρ)
inputs.businessContext: Density of the fluid. For water at 20°C, 998 kg/m³.

businessContext_i18n.en: Density of the fluid. For water at 20°C, 998 kg/m³.
businessContext_i18n.de: Dichte des Fluids. Für Wasser bei 20°C: 998 kg/m³.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Densité du fluide. Pour l'eau à 20°C, 998 kg/m³.
businessContext_i18n.es: Densidad del fluido. Para agua a 20°C, 998 kg/m³.

inputs.label: Pressure Difference (ΔP)
inputs.businessContext: Differential pressure across the orifice, measured in Pascals.

businessContext_i18n.en: Differential pressure across the orifice, measured in Pascals.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Orifis boyunca diferansiyel basınç, Pascal cinsinden ölçülür.
businessContext_i18n.de: Differenzdruck über der Öffnung, gemessen in Pascal.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pression différentielle à travers l'orifice, mesurée en Pascals.
businessContext_i18n.es: Presión diferencial a través del orificio, medida en Pascales.
businessContext_i18n.ar: فرق الضغط عبر الفتحة، مقاسًا بالباسكال.

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
